justification: Have Fun Doge3 meme token with only 13 holders, 1-day trading window, unverified source, no market data. Insufficient evidence for a verdict; pattern could be abandoned or failed launch rather than confirmed fraud.
JogaNetwork (JOGA) ERC-20 token with 1,373 holders, verified contract (exact match), Solidity 0.8+, low 24h activity. No documented fraud, no honeypot flag; speculative low-activity project.
Datai (DATAI) ERC-20 token with 1,366 holders, verified contract (exact match). No documented fraud or honeypot flag; speculative AI-branded token with thin activity.

Marie Rose (MARIE) ERC-20 meme token with 3,480 holders, verified contract. Distinct from the SPX6900-associated MARIE at 0xe8ca586752dced42e3d8776efb298f552dfbee04. Ticker collision, no documented fraud.
Grok Imagine ERC-20 memecoin riffing on xAI's Grok Imagine image-generation product; 4,127 holders, verified contract (exact match). No documented fraud; speculative meme.
ETH6900 meme coin (SPX6900-style Ethereum variant) with 872 holders, verified contract (exact match). No documented fraud; speculative SPX6900-riff memecoin.
Bitcoin 6900 (BTC6900) SPX6900-style meme variant with 248 holders, verified contract. No documented fraud; speculative memecoin.
Zama (ZAMA) — native token of Zama Protocol, legitimate FHE (Fully Homomorphic Encryption) cryptography project. Launched Feb 2 2026; listed on Phemex, LBank. Used for payment and operator rewards.
Valentine Grok Companion meme coin with 782 holders. Obfuscated function names and owner ETH recovery are concerning but no definitive rug-pull evidence; typical speculative meme launch.
XIAOBAI (小白) ERC-20 with 272 holders, verified source (MIT-licensed, Solidity 0.8.27). Standard meme token with burn function; no documented fraud.
Morpho (MORPHO) — legitimate governance token of Morpho lending protocol. Wrapped version enables on-chain vote tracking (MIP-75). Canonical Morpho DAO token.
Glacier Ai Network (GLAI) with 710 holders, verified source but obfuscated function names. No documented fraud but unaudited and low-activity; speculative AI-branded token.
PORKY PIG PARTY (PPP) meme token with 548 holders. Contract contains obfuscated tax/wallet functions typical of soft-rug patterns but no published forensic report.

Angle Protocol USDA — decentralized, over-collateralized USD stablecoin backed by US Treasury bills and tokenized T-bills. Legitimate institutional RWA stablecoin; redemption/minting flows drive volume signature. Angle is winding down with 1:1 redemption until March 2027.
Token at this address is ETHERBUTTS meme coin, NOT Mantle Staked ETH (which is 0xd5f7838f5c461feff7fe49ea5ebaf7728bb0adfa). Ticker collision but no fraud documented; speculative meme.
fric the frog ERC-20 memecoin with 257 holders, verified contract (exact match, Solidity 0.8.27). No documented fraud; standard pepe-style meme launch.
Beam (BEAM) — native token of Beam gaming blockchain (Avalanche subnet), empowered by Merit Circle DAO. Legitimate gaming-focused project; result of MC-to-BEAM migration (MIP-28/29).

Bitcoin Hyper (HYPER) is explicitly flagged by Etherscan as HONEYPOT with a 'SUSPICIOUS: User discretion advised' reputation warning. Zero market cap, zero recent transfers; textbook honeypot contract trapping investor funds.
Saylor Moon (SAYLOR) meme token (Michael Saylor riff) with 1,816 holders, verified contract. No documented fraud; speculative celebrity meme.
wojak (Feels Guy) meme coin — 8,025 holders, verified contract, 420T supply (meme convention). Active project with official site wojakcto.com, listed on major trackers. No documented rug.
Blazing Token (BLA) with only 5 holders, 1-day trading window, Solidity 0.5.11 old compiler, no market data. Pattern fits abandoned launch but insufficient forensic evidence.

Maple Finance syrupUSDC — yield-bearing stablecoin channeling lenders into fixed-rate overcollateralized loans to institutional borrowers; $1.25B market cap. Legitimate institutional DeFi yield product; redemption/mint flows drive high-volume signal.
Curve.fi FRAX/USDC LP token (crvFRAX, aka FraxBP) — base-pool liquidity receipt on Curve Finance, deployed June 2022. Legitimate DeFi LP token; rebalancing drives volume signal similar to 3Crv.

Elixir deUSD — synthetic dollar backed by delta-neutral ETH funding positions, used by BlackRock/Hamilton Lane/Apollo for RWA-to-DeFi. Elixir has announced shutdown with redemption processing underway — legitimate wind-down, not fraud; redemption flows drive the volume signature.

Aztec (AZTEC) — native token of Aztec Network, a zkSNARK privacy-preserving L2 on Ethereum. Backed by $100M Series B led by a16z. 11,902 holders, $328M market cap. Token used for staking/sequencer participation.
Maker (MKR) — MakerDAO governance token, founded 2015. Canonical ERC-20 MKR contract; project has since rebranded to Sky (SKY). Deeply established DeFi blue chip.
HyperSignals (HYSG) ERC-20 with 512 holders, verified contract, no market data. No documented fraud; low-activity speculative token.

Maple Finance SYRUP — governance/staking token, result of 2023 MPL-to-SYRUP migration. $269M market cap, listed on Binance, Balancer, Pendle. 25% of protocol revenue funds buybacks. Legitimate DeFi blue chip.

Blockstreet (Block) — LayerZero OFT-enabled token with 15,056 holders, $1.98M market cap, positioned as USD1 adoption infrastructure. Verified contract, NEUTRAL reputation on Etherscan; no documented fraud.
OWLNEKO meme token with 110 holders, verified contract. Standard meme token with tax/trading mechanics; no documented fraud.

Xenlon Mars (XLON) — burn-based reward token tied to DBXen (receive 100M XLON per DBXen burned). NOT Tokenlon. 2,478 holders, verified contract, no market data. No documented fraud; DBXen ecosystem satellite.
BRO meme token with 88 holders, verified contract, standard open-trading/tax mechanics. No documented fraud; low-activity speculative launch.
CaptainPepe (CAPE) ERC-20 meme token with 984 holders, verified contract. Tax mechanics typical of meme launches; no documented fraud.
Flutter AI (FLUTTER) ERC-20 with 4,484 holders, verified contract. Obfuscated function names raise concern but no documented fraud or honeypot flag; speculative AI-branded token.
Hana the Dog (HANA) dog-meme token with 2,131 holders, verified contract, standard tax mechanics. No documented fraud; speculative meme.
PenXChain (PENX) ERC-20 with 1,054 holders, verified contract (exact match). Standard ERC-20 with no documented fraud; low-activity project.
Pochita (POCHITA) Chainsaw Man anime meme coin with 1,810 holders, verified contract (exact match). Standard meme tax mechanics; no documented fraud.
Cronos Coin (CRO) — native token of Crypto.com exchange and Cronos PoS chain. ERC-20 version has 334,640 holders; 100B supply. Canonical exchange token, legitimate major project.

PEPE token at this address is NOT the canonical PEPE (0x6982508145454ce325ddbe47a25d4ec3d2311933). Only 585 holders, generic 'Token' contract name, low trust. Not an official PEPE; likely speculative copycat but no documented fraud.
Staked DOLA (sDOLA) — Inverse Finance's yield-bearing synthetic stablecoin earning from FiRM fixed-rate lending revenues. Legitimate DeFi yield vault; staking/redemption drives volume signature.
Apes Gone Wild (AGW) ERC-20 meme token with 96 holders — NOT Abstract Global Wallet (which is a smart-contract wallet, not a token). Standard meme token mechanics; no documented fraud.
WODIU ERC-20 with only 102 holders, zero market data, 7-day trading window, 25% trade dominance. Pattern fits wash-trade / pump-and-dump signature but no published forensic documentation.
GangsterCity (GCY) game-themed ERC-20 with 87 holders, verified contract, standard tax/fee mechanics. No documented fraud; speculative game-branded launch.
TRIFI ERC-20 with 240 holders, verified contract. Complex reflection/alchemy mechanics but no documented fraud; speculative DeFi-inspired project.
Decentralized Onion (DEON) ERC-20 with 73 holders, verified contract, 21M supply (BTC-mimic). Standard tax mechanics; no documented fraud.
CULT BROS (CULTB) hyper-deflationary ERC-20 with 86 holders, verified contract, official site cultbros.co. Standard deflationary meme mechanics; no documented fraud.

Yangue v2 (YANG) ERC-20 with 2,734 holders, verified contract, Solidity 0.4.24 (legacy-era deployment). DIFFERENT project from Defrost Finance YANG at 0x81611acd4460fd996aa657835af044644fa8ae29. No documented fraud.
Emojis Farm (EMOJI) DeFi liquidity platform token with 142 holders, $52K market cap, Solidity 0.5.17. Low activity but no documented fraud or exploit.

Resolv Labs wstUSR — suffered March 22 2026 exploit via compromised AWS-hosted SERVICE_ROLE private key, attacker minted ~46M unauthorized USR. Resolv executed on-chain upgrade April 6 2026 to burn 36.73M unauthorized wstUSR/stUSR. Textbook external HACK event.
PunkStrategy (PNKSTR) — DAT-style project with 9,819 holders, verified contract. Likely riff on ETH Strategy / CryptoPunks strategy theme; no documented fraud.

Resolv (RESOLV) — native governance token of Resolv Labs (USR stablecoin protocol). 1B cap, launched with 10% airdrop at TGE, 26.7% team 1-year cliff. Legitimate governance token of an established DeFi protocol.
Project 89 (PROJECT89) — AI-powered ARG token with 5000 Proxim8 NFTs. Originally Solana Pump.fun, Ethereum variant launched Sept 2025. Active project with narrative/gamification; no documented rug.

Function FBTC (formerly Ignition FBTC) — tokenized BTC backed 1:1 for DeFi yield. Backed by Mantle, Antalpha Prime, Galaxy Digital. $1.5B TVL, $826M market cap. Legitimate institutional-grade BTC wrapper; redemption/mint drives volume.

Vultisig (VULT) — native token of vultisig.com multichain multi-asset crypto vault with agentic infrastructure. 4,054 holders, $14.1M market cap, verified contract. Legitimate small-cap infrastructure project.
BitDoge (BITDOGE) meme token with 93 holders, verified contract. Standard meme mechanics; no documented fraud.

Second ETH6900 token (different address from 0x3081f70000e8cf8be2afcae3db6b9d9c796caec5) with 178 holders, admin-controlled trading/tax functions. Typical meme launch; no documented fraud. Multiple ETH6900 contracts = meme ticker collision.

Melon Token (MLN) — legacy Melon Protocol, rebranded to Enzyme Finance. Tokenized asset management infrastructure since 2017. Founded by ex-Goldman Sachs Mona El Isa. Canonical MLN contract; legitimate established project.
Elon's Hedgehog (SHRUB) meme token with 109 holders, verified contract. Standard celebrity-meme mechanics; no documented fraud.

Bitcoin Hyper (HYPER) ERC-20 with 421 holders — NOT Hyperliquid (HYPE). Distinct from the honeypot HYPER at 0x840a6c2193ff5fda773ca9bb4128affbd552a5a2. No documented fraud on this specific contract; speculative BTC-branded meme.
Railgun (RAIL) — governance token of Railgun, a ZK-privacy protocol for Ethereum with verifiable compliance reports. 7,087 holders, $1.57 price, established project listed on CMC/CoinGecko.
Baby Yoda (YODA) Star Wars meme token with 101 holders, verified contract, standard buy/sell/auto-nuke LP mechanics. No documented fraud; speculative meme.
Anchin Kiyohime (KIYO) anime-themed meme with 222 holders, verified contract. Standard meme tax mechanics; no documented fraud.

DFED with extreme-low max supply (112 DFED), 60 holders, 4-day trading window, 0.3 trade dominance. Unusual supply + concentrated pattern consistent with experimental/abandoned token but no published forensic report.

Up It Go (UPITGO) with only 18 holders, 6-day trading window, 0.5 trade dominance, 'inactivityWithdrawal' function. Pattern fits soft-rug but no forensic publication; insufficient evidence for FRAUD verdict.

KingOfCandy (KFC!) — explicit brand impersonation of Kentucky Fried Chicken (ticker designed to mimic KFC). Unverified contract, 0.5 trade dominance on 6-day window. Brand hijack pattern matches registry's existing FRAUD impersonation entries (CZI, MAYNU).
Trance Protocol with only 3 holders, 1-day trading window, 0.5 trade dominance, tax/manualSwap functions. Pattern strongly suggests soft-rug but no forensic publication.

ZSTABLE.PROTOCOL (ZST) with 45 holders, 1-day trading, 0.5 trade dominance, presale/pool mechanics, Solidity 0.6.12 with 12 compiler bugs. Pattern fits abandoned or failed launch; no forensic publication.
MaggotToken (MAGGOT) with 6,082 holders, verified contract. Higher holder count than typical rug; standard meme mechanics. No documented fraud.
Seal Finance yield-farming token with 347 holders, website down, $0 price, Solidity 0.5.17. Appears abandoned rather than rugged; insufficient documentation for definitive verdict.

Lift Dollar (USDL) — US dollar-backed stablecoin distributing yield from cash/cash-equivalent reserves daily. Official site liftdollar.com, 748 holders, $1.00 peg. Legitimate yield-bearing stablecoin; mint/burn drives volume signature.

Alchemix USD (alUSD) — yield-backed synthetic stablecoin minted against DAI deposits in Alchemix vaults (200% collateralized). Canonical Alchemix protocol token; 14.8M supply, 100bps peg. Legitimate DeFi stablecoin.

Falcon Finance (FF) — universal collateral infrastructure governance/staking token. 10,773 holders, $0.07 price, 10B cap, NEUTRAL reputation, verified contract. Legitimate project though unaudited; no documented fraud.

Mithril Share (MIS) — algorithmic stablecoin share token (Basis/Empire-cash-fork era). 959 holders, NEUTRAL reputation, trades on SushiSwap. Low activity but established DeFi experiment, no documented rug.
Crab Market (CRAB) variable-yield DeFi token with 323 holders, official site crab.finance, Solidity 0.6.4. Low-activity but no documented fraud.
GobStrategy (GOBSTR) — minimal-proxy NFTStrategy token integrating Uniswap V4 (UUPS upgradeable). 830 holders, no market data, niche NFT/strategy infrastructure token. No documented fraud.

Stader ETHx — legitimate liquid staking token for ETH (launched 2023-06-06) allowing validator operation with 4.4 ETH minimum. Non-rebase LST; institutional-grade, widely integrated. Same category as osETH/rstETH in existing registry.
TrueFi (TRU) — governance token of TrueFi uncollateralized-lending DeFi protocol. 14,185 holders, $5.6M market cap, official site truefi.io. Established DeFi project since 2020.

LABUBU community memecoin inspired by Pop Mart's Labubu collectible character. 1,485 holders, $36K market cap. Self-identified as unauthorized community meme; no documented rug but IP-adjacent (similar in spirit to registry's BOSS entry).
ETH人生 (ETH Life) with 256 holders, strict launch-block restrictions (buys blocked during 'launch blockock'), 2% wallet cap. Pattern fits brand-new launch; insufficient time/evidence for verdict.
Truebit (TRU) — computation-verification protocol, DIFFERENT from TrueFi (ticker collision). 19,109 holders, 3.33T supply, Solidity 0.5.3. Established legacy project; no documented fraud.

World Liberty Financial (WLFI) — Trump-family-linked DeFi governance token, ~$2.4B market cap, 98,349 holders, upgradeable proxy. Recent Justin Sun lawsuit over token freeze/blacklist is regulatory controversy but not fraud. NOTE: Round 1 registry has this project at 0x1963a95cfc30e49cc75f7f2de6027289971cac79 which may be the wrong address; this 0xda5e... is the canonical WLFI per Etherscan/CoinGecko.

OnlyUp (UP) — rebase token with marketing/dev fees, 189 holders (down from ~218 earlier), $11K market cap, 23-day trading window. Pattern consistent with pump-and-dump collapse but no published forensic report naming this token.
Bancor Network Token (BNT) — canonical governance token of Bancor on-chain liquidity protocol (Carbon trading protocol). 108.8M supply, established DeFi blue chip since 2017.

Strudel BTC (VBTC) — one-way trustless bridge token from Strudel Finance (BTC burned on Bitcoin to mint VBTC on Ethereum). 208 holders, 23.27 VBTC supply, strudel.finance. Legitimate alternative BTC wrapper.
SURGE ERC-20 with 47 holders, verified contract, burnPoolTokens decay mechanism. No explicit suspicious/honeypot flag; low-activity speculative token.
ENVEKZION ULTRA (ENVZ) with only 5 holders, 1-day trading, 0.5 trade dominance, pause/lock/stake mechanics. Pattern fits abandoned experimental or soft-rug but no forensic publication.
Biggie (BIGGIE) American-Bully-meme ERC-20 with 2,578 holders, $94K market cap, verified Solidity 0.8.19 contract. Declining activity but legitimate meme launch with no documented fraud.

Inu Kubo (KUBO) — obfuscated function names (AJA12412KUBOH02I52305Z, rescueKUBOH02I5ETH), owner tax/wallet controls, only 64 holders, 1-day trading window, 0.49 trade dominance. Obfuscated-code + concentrated-insider pattern matches registry's existing soft-rug FRAUD entries (URL, MAYNU).
BOAW with only 3 holders, 1-day trading window, 1.0 trade dominance (perfect wash-trade signature), no market data. Pattern fits insider-only trading but no forensic publication.

Akita Ken (AKITA) at this address is NOT the legitimate Akita Inu (which is 0x3301ee63fb29f863f2333bd4466acb46cd8323e6). Only 599 holders, 9-day trading window, owner-controlled modifiable tax, no audit. Ticker impersonation of established Akita Inu brand fits registry's FRAUD-impersonation pattern.

Macropod AUDM — AFSL-regulated Australian stablecoin pegged 1:1 to AUD, each token backed by 1 AUD in segregated bank trust. Issued by Macropod, listed at macropod.com. Legitimate regulated stablecoin; mint/redeem drives volume signature.

Bitcoin (BTC.b) ERC-20 with 122 holders, transparent upgradeable proxy, 33.93 max supply. Naming mimics Avalanche's BTC.b bridged-Bitcoin but no verified issuer identified on this address. Possible impersonation but insufficient documentation.

Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) — native utility/governance token of Pudgy Penguins ecosystem (Luca Netz, NFT/toy brand). Official multi-chain deployment on Ethereum, BSC, Solana, Abstract, HyperEVM. Confirmed legitimate per CoinGecko.

USDat — non-yielding stablecoin 100% backed by tokenized US Treasuries, issued by Saturn Credit (saturn.credit). 243 holders, $60.1M max supply, upgradeable proxy. Legitimate institutional RWA stablecoin.
Bro (BRO) meme token with 464 holders, verified contract, buy/sell fee + launch-restriction mechanics. Standard meme launch; no documented fraud.

Nirvana DeFi BLISS — Safemoon/Titano-fork style 'autonomous yield + rising price floor' token, website (nirvanadefi.com) down, 249 holders, $6.5K market cap, Solidity 0.6.12. Abandoned 2021-era DeFi experiment; pattern resembles failed tokenomics rather than deliberate rug but no forensic documentation.

BULLETSTORM (BST) with only 20 holders, 2-day trading window, 0.5 trade dominance, custom owner-controlled tax transfer. Pattern fits rug-launch signature (matches rug-pattern stratum) but no forensic documentation.

OrbDEGEN (ORBDEG) — 93 holders, 1-day trading window, 0.5 trade dominance, identical max-volume signature to SPHERUM and ORBS (~$8.5M each). Whitelist-restricted mint, Solidity 0.6.12 with 12 compiler bugs. Coordinated rug-pattern launch with SPHERUM/ORBS; matches rug-pattern stratum signature with near-identical on-chain fingerprint.

SPHERUM — 6 holders, 1-day trading window, 0.5 trade dominance, 'exponential price growth' self-described as experimental, identical volume signature ($8,517,302) to ORBDEG and ORBS. Coordinated rug-pattern deployment; extreme-concentration launch fits insider-dump fraud pattern.

OrbS (ORBS) at this address — 72 holders, 1-day trading window, 0.5 trade dominance, createUniswap auto-liquidity function, identical ~$8.5M volume signature to ORBDEG/SPHERUM. NOT the legitimate Orbs Network (ticker collision). Coordinated rug-pattern launch; insider-dump fraud pattern.
